heading: Successorship provisions relating to bargaining units and exclusive representatives
label: 7011 Successorship provisions relating to bargaining units and exclusive representatives

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If the exercise of the Secretary’s authority under this chapter results in changes to an existing bargaining unit that has been certified under chapter 71 of title 5, the affected parties shall attempt to reach a voluntary agreement on a new bargaining unit and an exclusive representative for such unit.

children.label: A
children.text: sections 7103(a)(4), 7111(e), 7111(f)(1), and 7120 of title 5, relating to determining an exclusive representative; and

children.label: B
children.text: (disregarding subsections (b)(5) and (d) thereof), relating to determining appropriate units.section 7112 of title 5

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If the affected parties reach agreement on the appropriate unit and the exclusive representative for such unit under subsection (a), the Federal Labor Relations Authority shall certify the terms of such agreement, subject to paragraph (2)(A). Nothing in this subsection shall be considered to require the holding of any hearing or election as a condition for certification.

children.label: i
children.text: it determines that any of the criteria referred to in subsection (a)(2) (disregarding ) have not been met; orsection 7112(a) of title 5

children.label: ii
children.text: after the Secretary’s exercise of authority and before certification under this section, a valid election under is held covering any employees who would be included in the unit proposed for certification.section 7111(b) of title 5

children.heading: Temporary waiver of provision that would bar an election after a collective bargaining agreement is reached
children.label: B Temporary waiver of provision that would bar an election after a collective bargaining agreement is reached
children.text: Nothing in shall prevent the holding of an election under section 7111(b) of such title that covers employees within a unit certified under paragraph (1), or giving effect to the results of such an election (including a decision not to be represented by any labor organization), if the election is held before the end of the 12-month period beginning on the date such unit is so certified.section 7111(f)(3) of title 5

children.heading: Clarification
children.label: C Clarification
children.text: The certification of a unit under paragraph (1) shall not, for purposes of the last sentence of or section 7111(f)(4) of such title, be treated as if it had occurred pursuant to an election.section 7111(b) of title 5

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Federal Labor Relations Authority may delegate to any regional director (as referred to in ) its authority under the preceding provisions of this subsection.section 7105(e) of title 5

children.heading: Review
children.label: B Review
children.text: Any action taken by a regional director under subparagraph (A) shall be subject to review under the provisions of in the same manner as if such action had been taken under section 7105(e) of such title, except that in the case of a decision not to certify, such review shall be required if application therefor is filed by an affected party within the time specified in such provisions.section 7105(f) of title 5
with respect to an exercise of authority by the Secretary under this chapter, any labor organization affected thereby; and
